# Wonderland

# Overview

Wonderland is a narrative style defined by [Alice in Wonderland](../Inspirations/Inspirations/Alice%20in%20Wonderland%20ca98e0e27dff4b77adff51cfedaca5ce.md).

Marloth is a form of Wonderland.

# Sapphire and Steel

It is important to note that [Sapphire and Steel](../Inspirations/Inspirations/Sapphire%20and%20Steel%20f4522f813fe047fe9cc7daef159bed6d.md) is one of the coolest examples of surreal storytelling I have ever seen, yet it does not fit the normal mold of Wonderland.
